focus: Keep it easy: prioritize sleep opportunity, hydration, protein, and a relaxed walk or mobility. Avoid intensity unless you feel unexpectedly fresh.

displayNotes: Use cards for scanability on iPhone: one primary number, status pill, and 2–3 details.
Use baseline/range visualization for HRV because personal baseline matters more than population comparison.
Use progress bars for readiness, sleep score, Body Battery, steps, intensity minutes, and nutrition.
Use 7-day trends for movement and resting metrics so one bad day does not dominate.
This update used direct Garmin API calls plus the nutrition markdown log; latest complete Garmin day was used due mostly-null current-day data.
